arts.sum: Bundesliga giants strong favourites to progress

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Champions League predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Celtic
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Champions League fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Celtic.

arts.ttl: Warren O'Hora in Celtic 'same season' disbelief as Hibs star takes 3 things from St Mirren stalemate
arts.sum: David Gray's men are on a 12-match unbeaten run since losing at Parkhead in early December

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich to trash plan and get Florian Wirtz this summer? If not, maybe Manchester City’s Phil Foden?; Lothar Matthäus stunned by Bayern performance vs. Bayer Leverkusen; Tottenham, Chelsea, Arsenal want Jamie Gittens; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are working to try to sign Bayer Leverkusen attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz in the summer transfer window, according to Nicolo Schira. The rumors swirling of late have all focused on Florian Wirtz extending his contract with Bayer Leverkusen in 2025 before eventually seeing Bayern Munich exercise his release clause in 2026.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Loan Works: A strange week has only a few bright spots for Bayern loanees
arts.sum: A couple of bright spots include a Natalia Padilla goal for Sevilla and Paul Wanner helping Heidenheim in their first leg of the Conference League knockout. There are four players on loan in the German Bundesliga: Alexander Nübel, Franz Krätzig, Paul Wanner, and Armando Sieb.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala dismisses added pressure following lucrative contract extension with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s Jamal Musiala recently extended his contract at the club until 2030, penning a lucrative extension that reportedly sees him to become joint-highest earner at the club with star striker Harry Kane. But Musiala himself sees little difference in the pressure on him.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich absorbing everything going on around him as he contemplates future at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich is considered by many to be the last remaining, vital cog in the club’s machine that needs to be signed ahead of next season — before the front office can even think about bolstering the unit with players from the outside. As of now, Kimmich is just observing everything going on around him — including the signings of other players like Alphonso Davies and Jamal Musiala.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Celtic: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich take on Celtic in the second leg of their Champions League play-off on Tuesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Jota says Celtic FC is headed to Germany for “fight” with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Celtic FC is down 2-1 on aggregate to Bayern Munich heading into the second leg of the Champions League playoff round, but that does not mean that the Scottish power is feeling down-and-out. Looking for more thoughts and analysis on Bayern Munich’s Champions League tilt with Celtic FC?

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel in ‘age limit’ retort ahead of Bayern showdown
arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel believes “experience is the biggest gift” in football – and has shut down comments about being an "old" goalkeeper.
